name: Oven Barbequed Salmon
recipeInstructions:
1. Remove head and tail from salmon and fillet.
2. Place one-half skin side down on a large sheet of foil in a baking pan.
3. Add spices and layer with lemon, onion, and bacon.
4. Mix syrup and ketchup; pour half of this mixture over the fillet.
5. Place second fillet flesh side down over the first; pour the rest of the sauce over all.
6. Seal with the foil and bake 30-40 minutes at 400°F.
7. Fish will flake easily with a fork in the thickest part when it is done. Do not overbake.
8. Serve hot; oven baked potatoes or corn would make a good accompaniment with a green salad.
